title: milium distichum
intro: Milium distichum, also known as Wild Millet or Milium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Wild Millet can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by steeping the roots in a solvent like ethanol.
